items.title: Front crop aspect ratio
items.description: Fixed the front crop aspect ratio in article settings to maintain consistent sizing at 0.45, ensuring the crop preview matches the actual editing dimensions regardless of custom configuration changes.

items.title: Toplist counter display
items.description: Fixed a display issue where toplist counters were not appearing correctly when enabled with background colors, ensuring proper padding and counter positioning.

items.title: Gallery article title option
items.description: Added the ability to display the parent article title as the gallery title when a gallery is viewed within an article context, providing better content continuity and navigation context for readers.

items.title: Custom tags description field
items.description: Added description field to custom tags in the admin interface. Descriptions are visible only on the admin page, and all previews are collapsed by default for easier navigation and debugging.

items.title: Parallax space option
items.description: Added '20% of viewport' option for space below in Parallax settings, providing more flexibility in creating visual layouts.

items.title: Enhanced byline management
items.description: You can now edit bylines you've created and delete bylines with appropriate permissions (requires 'node_delete_all' permission). Your own bylines are displayed by default for easier access. Deleted bylines remain functional on published pages and author pages.

items.title: Article list callback check
items.description: Fixed an error in article lists and notice lists where callback functions were called without checking if they existed, improving stability when rendering content.

items.title: Schema markup cleanup
items.description: Removed 'itemtype' and 'itemscope' attributes from article lists and subarticles to improve SEO performance and eliminate redundant schema markup.

items.title: Gallery enhancements
items.description: Added options to display image count, hide top images, and hide navigation arrows in galleries. Description text is now clickable as a link. Includes Czech translation file and 'images' translation for all supported languages.

items.title: Quote style fixes
items.description: Corrected style definitions for quote boxes that were missing from the style configuration, ensuring consistent appearance across the platform.

items.title: Section link alignment
items.description: Fixed text alignment (center and right) for section links in article headers. Section links now properly respect the chosen alignment settings.
